name: maltego-teeth
title: maltego-teeth
description:
Set of offensive Maltego transforms
A set of transforms for Maltego to run nmap, sqlmap, and more
against entitites in Maltego.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use maltego-teeth because Set of offensive Maltego transforms.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use maltego-teeth as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair maltego-teeth with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `maltego-teeth --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
